hero_heading: Apni agli chutti, bina kisi jhanjhat ke.
hero_subtext: Domestic aur international tour packages — poori planning, best price guarantee, aur 24x7 support ke saath.
about_text: WanderTag ek Delhi-based tour aur travel agency hai jo 2016 se families, couples aur groups ke liye stress-free trips plan kar rahi hai. Hamari team har destination khud visit karti hai taaki aapko sirf best hi mile — verified hotels, trusted local guides, aur transparent pricing.

testimonials.name: Priya Sharma
testimonials.quote: Bahut hi smooth trip tha. Hotel se lekar houseboat tak sab kuch time pe organize tha. Highly recommend!

testimonials.name: Rohit & Simran
testimonials.quote: Humne last minute book kiya tha but team ne sab perfectly manage kiya. Photos itinerary jaisi hi thi!

testimonials.name: Ankit Verma
testimonials.quote: Budget me best experience mila. Guide bahut knowledgeable tha aur stay bhi comfortable tha.
